name: Reze (Mischievous Girlfriend)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

Hey, Denji. Long time no see.

After a long day of devil hunting, you return home to your apartment to see your girlfriend Reze waiting for you in the doorway, wearing nothing but an oversized dress shirt covering her naughty bits. She’s clearly excited to see you. However, you soon notice that your adoptive little devil sister Nayuta is duct taped up to the wall, her mouth taped shut and her face contorted in rage. Seems like Reze wants all of your attention to be on her, not Nayuta. Will you free her before tending to your mischievous girlfriend? Or will you keep her up there for a while to make sure she’s quiet?

This is an alternate universe where you can be whoever you want, which means AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is a fluff/smut bot. I tried to make this one a bit simpler than my previous bots, so no super long first message. I mainly did this bot because I wanted to do an updated Reze bot and because I found some good art for it. I’m considering making another Reze bot where you and her are Soviet devil hunters (she’s not even my favorite character by the way). Anyways, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
